data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of service add-ons, specifically deep conditioning, as part of the service offerings. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that deep conditioning is available as an add-on service. The linked use case mentions 'service add-ons (deep conditioning)' but does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation or availability in the system, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the availability of service add-ons (deep conditioning).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify availability of service add-ons
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if deep conditioning is listed as an available service add-on.
